程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

接口 IControllerState

public interface IControllerState
Read-only live view of a controller's hardware state.

Axis values are normalized to -1.0 to 1.0. Trigger values are normalized to 0.0 to 1.0. Y-axis: up is negative, down is positive (screen coordinate convention).

Important: This is NOT a snapshot. The underlying state changes each tick. Only read from the client main thread. Do not cache references across ticks.

Thread safety: Individual field reads are atomic and visible across threads (backed by volatile fields). However, there is no consistency guarantee across multiple fields — successive reads of different fields may reflect different poll ticks.

从以下版本开始:
1.0.0

  • 方法详细资料

    • isConnected

      boolean isConnected()
      返回:
      true if the controller is connected

    • getLeftStickX

      float getLeftStickX()
      返回:
      left stick X axis (-1.0 = full left, 1.0 = full right)

    • getLeftStickY

      float getLeftStickY()
      返回:
      left stick Y axis (-1.0 = full up, 1.0 = full down)

    • getRightStickX

      float getRightStickX()
      返回:
      right stick X axis (-1.0 = full left, 1.0 = full right)

    • getRightStickY

      float getRightStickY()
      返回:
      right stick Y axis (-1.0 = full up, 1.0 = full down)

    • getLeftTrigger

      float getLeftTrigger()
      返回:
      left trigger value (0.0 = released, 1.0 = fully pressed)

    • getRightTrigger

      float getRightTrigger()
      返回:
      right trigger value (0.0 = released, 1.0 = fully pressed)

    • isLeftTriggerPressed

      default boolean isLeftTriggerPressed()
      返回:
      true if left trigger is pressed beyond threshold (default 0.5)

    • isRightTriggerPressed

      default boolean isRightTriggerPressed()
      返回:
      true if right trigger is pressed beyond threshold (default 0.5)

      boolean isButtonAPressed()

      boolean isButtonBPressed()

    • isTouchpadPressed

    • isShiftLayerActive

      boolean isShiftLayerActive()

    • isButtonPressed

      boolean isButtonPressed(String buttonName)
      Query a button state by name string. Prefer ButtonName constants over raw strings.
      参数:
      buttonName - the button identifier (camelCase, e.g. "buttonA", "leftBumper")
      返回:
      true if the button is pressed, false if unknown

    • getAxisValue

      float getAxisValue(String axisName)
      Query an analog axis value by name string. Prefer ButtonName constants (e.g. ButtonName.AXIS_LEFT_X).
      参数:
      axisName - the axis identifier ("leftStickX", "rightTrigger", etc.)
      返回:
      normalized axis value, or 0.0f if unknown
